title: Adjuvant Chemotherapy ± Chemoradiotherapy for Adenocarcinoma of the Pancreatic Head: Results of the Radiotherapy Random Assignment of NRG Oncology/RTOG 0848.
abstract: To assess whether adding fluoropyrimidine sensitized radiotherapy (CXRT) to adjuvant chemotherapy improves overall survival (OS) after curative intent resection of the pancreatic head.
